title: AlienInUSA
description: Developed a cross-platform mobile application using Flutter and Firebase, catering to the needs of immigrants in the USA.
Implemented features like real-time visa status tracking and secure document storage with AES-256 encryption.
Integrated housing support and seamless payment processing using Stripe.
Applied modular architecture and atomic development principles to ensure scalability and maintainability.
Utilized Firebase Firestore for real-time data synchronization across devices, enhancing user experience.

title: Recipeee
description: Developed a web-based platform that generates recipe suggestions based on user-provided ingredients.
Designed the frontend using Flutter and implemented the backend with Node.js and Express.js.
Integrated Tesseract OCR for real-time ingredient recognition.
Implemented dynamic content rendering with WebSockets, ensuring low-latency server communication.
Created asynchronous workflows with Futures and Streams to provide localized suggestions and dietary customization.

title: Fluento
description: Developed a gamified language learning application using Flutter and Firebase.
Implemented real-time communication and personalized challenges using WebSockets to make learning interactive.
Designed a robust progress-tracking system with asynchronous workflows using Futures and Streams.
Applied modular design principles to ensure scalability and implemented performance optimization techniques, reducing response times by 20%.
